purpose: Starter observations for development and estimating-model tests. These are not national averages or live quotes.

currencyFallback.rateSource: Bank of Canada daily exchange rate
currencyFallback.rule: Use only when no Canadian observation or Canadian substitute exists. Always label the result as converted, not observed.

priceObservations.note: Low end of standard kits; compare included hinges, latch, fasteners, and finish before using as an exact match.
Upper end of standard kits; adjustable gate frames are a separate, higher-priced specification.
Recheck local stock and treatment before using; catalog availability was unclear.
Board profile may be flat rather than dog-ear; use only within the broader PT 1x6x6 substitution group until verified.
D4S board; use only within the broader PT 1x6x6 substitution group until the top profile is matched.
Conservative 2x2 proxy for a 1x2 or 1x3 batten when an exact local batten price is unavailable.
Everbilt Traditional Design Gate Kit, black, 3 pieces.
Onward 4-piece all-in-one steel outdoor gate kit, 90 lb load capacity.
Everbilt self-latching deluxe gate kit, black, 5 pieces.
Everbilt self-closing traditional gate kit, black, 3 pieces.
Everbilt heavy-duty steel fence gate bracket kit for gates 26 to 60 inches wide.
PVC pyramid cap; verify actual inside dimension against the post.
12.5 ga Canadian substitute; do not treat as an exact 11.5 ga match.
Tension-band product used as a provisional brace-band allowance.
Nuvo Iron wall-bracket proxy; confirm attachment and load requirements for the actual structure connection.
Non-retailer placeholder for a small nuts, bolts, and washers assortment. Replace with a selected kit or user price when known.

derivedCadFallbacks.note: Use a Canadian 30 kg concrete observation instead when its printed yield matches the project.
Exact-spec currency fallback. A Canadian 12.5 ga substitute is also recorded at CAD 371.07.
